tagline: Expanded sharing and SQL download capabilities.
what_it_does: Genie Agents, previously known as Genie Spaces, now allow sharing with all account users through a new share modal. Additionally, the APIs for downloading full query results have been updated to respect workspace-level settings for SQL downloads. This enhances the usability and accessibility of Genie Agents for data queries.
why_it_matters: These enhancements improve collaboration across teams by allowing broader access to Genie Agents, which can lead to increased productivity and better data-driven decision-making. The respect for SQL download settings also ensures compliance with organizational data governance policies.
plain_summary: You can now share Genie Agents with all users in your account and download SQL query results according to workspace settings.

capabilities.title: Share with All Users
capabilities.desc: The share modal now includes an option to share your Genie Agent with all account users.

capabilities.title: SQL Download Settings
capabilities.desc: APIs for downloading full query results now adhere to workspace-level SQL download settings.

prerequisites: Unity Catalog must be enabled and data registered.
Users must have Databricks SQL workspace entitlement.
CAN USE permission on a pro or serverless SQL warehouse is required.
use_cases: Business users querying data through natural language.
Data analysts configuring agents for specific data sets.
Teams collaborating on data insights using shared agents.
limitations: Each Genie Agent can support up to 10,000 conversations.
Each conversation can include up to 10,000 messages.

steps.title: Create New Agent
steps.desc: Click 'New' in the upper-right corner and choose data sources.

steps.title: Share Agent
steps.desc: Use the share modal to select 'All account users' and set permissions.

key_takeaway: The Genie Agent enhancements facilitate easier sharing and compliance with SQL download settings, fostering better collaboration and data governance.
